title: cistus libanotis var. viridis
intro: Cistus libanotis var. viridis, also known as rockrose or gum rockrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistus genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and woody stems. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Cistus libanotis var. viridis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
